case_title: JOHN D. GOINS VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,697.50 FILED BY GOINS, JOHN D. AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOINS, JOHN D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA $2,697.50 PRINCIPAL, $112.50 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,890.00, $1697.50 PLUS $1000.00 FOR WILFUL & MALICIOUS FAILURE TO STOP BAD FAITH COLLECTION OF MONEY NOT OWED. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-10-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
